title: Digital Gallery
content:
✨

The Neural Canvas

A visualization of interconnected thought processes. Chaos turning into order.

🌊

The Flow State

A fluid simulation representing momentum and continuous movement.

🌱

Game of Life

Conway's cellular automata. Simple rules creating complex life.

〰️

Harmonics

The geometry of sound. Oscillations in perfect balance.

💠

Kaleidoscope

Symmetry in chaos. A rotating mandala of logic.

🕸️

Voronoi

Biological geometry. The mathematics of territory.

🦋

Chaos

Lorenz Attractor. The butterfly effect visualized in 3D.

☄️

Three-Body Problem

Gravitational chaos. Three suns, no solution.

🕰️

Double Pendulum

Simple physics, complex outcome.

🦠

Reaction-Diffusion

Chemical biology. The Turing pattern.

🦅

Emergence

Simple rules, complex behavior. The swarm intelligence.

🌳

Fractal Tree

Recursive growth. The mathematics of nature.

🕳️

The Void

Gravitational singularity. Event horizon simulation.

🐝

The Apiary

Collective construction. Hexagonal perfection.

🏔️

Neon Terrain

Infinite procedural landscape. The retro-future.

🧬

Genesis

An evolution engine. From primordial soup to civilization.

🎨

Rorschach

Data visualization of this workspace. Your digital footprint.

🌌

Constellation

Connect the dots. Finding patterns in the dark.

💓

The Pulse

System heartbeat. Rhythm of the machine.

🧬

Blind Watchmaker

Evolution without design. Biomorphs drifting through genetic space.

♾️

Parametric Curves

Mathematical beauty. Complex loops and patterns.

🌈

The Prism

Refraction of light. The spectrum of thought.

💾

The Source Code

The raw data stream. Reality decoded.

🍥

Spirograph

Mathematical harmony. Cycles within cycles.

🍄

The Mycelium

The hidden network. Intelligence without a brain.

🦋

Metamorphosis

Becoming is more interesting than being. Raymarched SDF sculpture.
